query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `qumus_core_policies` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `category` VARCHAR(100),
  `rules` JSON,
  `priority` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `qumus_autonomous_actions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `policy_id` INT,
  `action_type` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `parameters` JSON,
  `status` ENUM('pending','executing','completed','failed','cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `result` JSON,
  `confidence` DECIMAL(5,4) DEFAULT 0,
  `requires_approval` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `approved_by` INT,
  `executed_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `qumus_human_review` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `action_id` INT,
  `reviewer_id` INT,
  `status` ENUM('pending','approved','rejected','escalated') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `notes` TEXT,
  `reviewed_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `qumus_decision_logs` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `policy_id` INT,
  `action_id` INT,
  `decision_type` VARCHAR(100),
  `input_data` JSON,
  `output_data` JSON,
  `confidence` DECIMAL(5,4) DEFAULT 0,
  `reasoning` TEXT,
  `was_autonomous` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `qumus_metrics` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `metric_type` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `metric_value` DECIMAL(10,4) DEFAULT 0,
  `period` VARCHAR(50),
  `metadata` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `qumus_policy_recommendations` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `policy_id` INT,
  `recommendation_type` VARCHAR(100),
  `description` TEXT,
  `confidence` DECIMAL(5,4) DEFAULT 0,
  `impact_assessment` JSON,
  `status` ENUM('pending','accepted','rejected','implemented') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `playlists` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `cover_url` TEXT,
  `is_public` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `track_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agents` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `type` VARCHAR(100),
  `status` ENUM('active','inactive','maintenance') DEFAULT 'active',
  `capabilities` JSON,
  `configuration` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
